title: Access
description: S3 access keys for object storage API and console API tokens for REST admin access.

empty.keys: No access keys yet. Create one for S3 API access.

createKey.title: Create access key
createKey.description: A new access key and secret will be generated. Store the secret securely.

created.title: Key created successfully
created.description: Copy both values now. The secret is shown only once.
created.warning: Store your secret key securely. You cannot retrieve it later from this console.

deleteKey.title: Delete access key
deleteKey.description: Delete access key "{{key}}"? Applications using this key will lose access.

createToken.title: Create API token
createToken.description: Console REST token with read/write scopes. Shown once at creation.
